title: RevitHostFragment
description: RevitHostFragment: Fragment containing the information about the Revit element that hosts the Revit element correspondent to the BHoM object that carries this.

HostId.description: ElementId of the Revit element that hosts the Revit element correspondent to the BHoM object that carries this.

LinkDocument.description: Name of the link document, if the host Revit element is linked.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
